description_long: This is a rectangular, built-in jacuzzi with a modern design, featuring a deep white acrylic basin set within a solid gray outer frame. The jacuzzi is designed for two people, as indicated by the presence of two black cushioned headrests positioned at one end. Multiple water jets are visible along the side walls and floor of the tub, suggesting hydrotherapy functionality. The outer frame is boxy and robust, likely constructed from reinforced materials to support the weight of water and occupants. The surface of the tub is glossy and smooth, with a clean, minimalist aesthetic. No visible control panel or steps are present, and the jacuzzi appears empty with no water inside.
description: A modern, rectangular jacuzzi with a white acrylic basin, gray outer frame, and two black headrests. Multiple water jets are visible, and the tub is empty.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two black headrests and the deep white basin set in a gray rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped backrest area with headrests and the length of the gray outer frame.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the foot end of the jacuzzi, with the headrests barely visible and the tub's depth apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the sloped backrest and headrests from the other side.
attribute_jets: side wall, round, 2 grouped on each side
